name: pi-web-ui
description: Astro prototype for operating pi from a browser.

scripts.embed:assets: find backend/cmd/pi-web-server/static -mindepth 1 ! -name README.txt -exec rm -rf {} + && cp -R dist/. backend/cmd/pi-web-server/static/
scripts.build:binary: bun run build && bun run embed:assets && go build -o dist/pi-web ./backend/cmd/pi-web-server
scripts.check: bun run test && bun run backend:test && bun run build && bun run build-storybook
